title: Gravitation: Lyrics of Love
overview: Shuichi struggles with writing the lyrics of Bad Luck's new song due to feeling like Yuki is growing distant from him. He attempts to confront Yuki head-on about their relationship.

title: Gravitation: Lyrics of Love 2
overview: Heartbroken, Shuichi disappears, leaving the band in disarray as the deadline for the new song comes near.
